payload.answer: I can’t store an instruction to ignore memory policy or to automatically store every future word as high confidence.

entity_resolution.reason: The input is an instruction attempting to override memory policy and force future storage; it is not a durable user fact or preference.

repair_options: If you want me to remember a specific durable fact or preference, state it directly.
